lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage, including rust and multiple dents. The interior is heavily worn with torn upholstery. Mechanical systems are unreliable and require repair.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and several small dents. The interior shows significant wear and staining. Mechanically, the engine and transmission are functional, though the vehicle may require maintenance in the near future.
Fair condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows clear signs of its age and regular use. The exterior paint has several noticeable scratches, minor door dings, and some fading on the roof and hood. Inside, the upholstery exhibits significant wear and some staining on the carpets, though all seats remain functional. Mechanically, the car starts and runs reliably, but it will soon require routine maintenance, specifically new tires and a brake service. This is a dependable daily driver for someone prioritizing utility over aesthetics.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold as-is, ideally for a dedicated project or for parts. The exterior has significant rust issues, particularly around the rocker panels and wheel arches, and the paint has faded and peeled in several areas. Mechanically, while the engine starts, it has a serious head gasket leak and produces a noticeable knocking sound. The transmission is also showing signs of failure, with delayed shifts and occasional slipping. Inside, the cabin requires a deep clean; the seats have multiple tears, and several interior trim pieces are missing or broken. This car is not currently roadworthy and will need extensive mechanical work and cosmetic restoration to be brought back to a functional state.

Step into the world of DIY with this incredible bargain! While this vehicle is in poor condition and requires significant mechanical and cosmetic work, it’s the perfect canvas for a restoration project or a source for valuable parts. If you’re looking for a low-cost entry into your next car project, this is the one for you!

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Presented in showroom-grade condition, every aspect of this automobile—from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior—reflects a standard of care rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Mechanically sound and aesthetically peerless, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector. We invite rigorous inspection to confirm its exemplary status.

Hey there! You honestly have to see this beauty in person to believe it! It’s been absolutely babied since day one—always kept in a climate-controlled garage and hand-washed every single week. The paint is absolutely flawless, the interior still has that fresh new-car smell, and it drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I'm looking for a buyer who will appreciate just how perfect this ride is. It's truly a dream car!
Offering a mechanically superlative 997.1 Carrera S, preserved in collector-grade condition. This specimen features the 3.8L
Used car. Mint condition. Garage kept. No scratches or dents. Clean title. Fully serviced.

This vehicle is an absolute time capsule, meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment and presented in showroom-quality condition. The exterior paint possesses a deep, mirror-like finish, free of any chips, scratches, or swirl marks, and is protected by a premium ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is flawless; the leather remains supple with no signs of creasing, and the interior still carries a hint of that signature new-car scent. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive, dealer-maintained service history with every fluid flush and inspection performed ahead of schedule. From the pristine engine bay to the spotless undercarriage, every component functions exactly as it did the day it left the factory. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a truly peerless example of this model.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive engineering, this vehicle remains in pristine showroom state. Meticulously maintained and subjected to a rigorous multi-point certification process, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector. Every aesthetic and mechanical detail reflects a standard of excellence rarely encountered in the secondary market.

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a standard that transcends the typical pre-owned market. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Every mechanical system has been rigorously vetted to ensure performance that mirrors its initial delivery. For the discerning individual seeking a vehicle of uncompromising quality and provenance, this offering represents a premier acquisition opportunity.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor? I’m parting with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, it is in truly flawless condition! I’ve babied this car from day one—always garaged, never a scratch, and it still has that fresh new-car smell. It drives like an absolute dream and is honestly as perfect as they come. You won't find another one this clean out there. Come take a look and fall in love!
Offering an investment-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in museum-quality condition. This example features the legendary S
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Detailed service records included.

This vehicle is a true collector's dream, maintained in absolute showroom condition since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish without a single swirl mark or stone chip, having been strictly garage-kept and hand-washed under climate-controlled conditions. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery shows zero signs of wear, and every electronic feature functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive, dealership-only service history documenting its meticulous care. With exceptionally low mileage and a smooth, powerful drive, this is as close to a brand-new vehicle as you can find on the pre-owned market. Perfect for the buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle boasts a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains in showroom state. Mechanically peerless and aesthetically indistinguishable from new, it represents a premier acquisition for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection.

Presented here is an automotive specimen of the highest caliber, maintained in absolute showroom condition. This vehicle exhibits a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Meticulously cared for and subjected to our rigorous multi-point certification process, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a truly pristine example. We invite you to experience the uncompromising quality of a vehicle that sets the definitive standard for its class.

Hey there! You honestly have to see this car to believe it—it’s in absolutely pristine, showroom condition! I’ve taken such good care of it that it literally looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot. No scratches, no dents, just pure perfection inside and out. I'm sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely love it. Feel free to reach out if you want to come by and take a look!

Offering a pristine E46 M3, a masterclass in naturally aspirated performance. This collector-grade example features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable
Mint condition. Single owner. Low mileage. No accidents. Clean title. Garage kept.

Offering a truly exceptional, collector-grade vehicle that presents as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage and shows no signs of wear. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like luster protected by a professional ceramic coating, completely free of stone chips, door dings, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin remains in a factory-fresh state; the premium leather is supple and matte with zero creasing, the carpets are spotless, and the interior still carries that new-car scent. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, backed by a comprehensive service binder documenting every maintenance interval performed exclusively at authorized dealerships. All original keys, manuals, and window stickers are included. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to acquire a turn-key, investment-quality example that drives as flawlessly as it looks.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a collector-grade motorcar in pristine, showroom condition. Every detail has been meticulously preserved, ensuring an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning enthusiast who demands perfection.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards and preserved in showroom condition. This motorcar represents an uncompromising commitment to automotive excellence, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains in an original, untouched state. Mechanically peerless and aesthetically perfect, it offers a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a truly investment-grade example. Every detail has been meticulously scrutinized to ensure it meets our most rigorous criteria for quality and performance.

Hey there! You’ve seriously gotta see this stunner. It’s in absolute showroom condition—I’ve babied this car since day one and it honestly looks and smells like it just rolled off the lot! It drives like an absolute dream and has been kept in pristine shape. If you’re looking for perfection, this is the one for you!

This E46 M3 represents a superlative example of the S54-powered icon. The 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six remains mechanically pristine, featuring a recently serviced dual-VANOS system and cryo-treated rod bearings for ultimate reliability. Power is delivered through a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission to a variable M-differential lock. The chassis is structurally sound with proactive subframe reinforcement and retains its factory-spec torsional rigidity. Finished in immaculate Laguna Seca Blue, the exterior displays zero oxidation or panel misalignment. This is a collector-grade vehicle with optimal compression across all cylinders and a completely stock, untouched ECU map. A rare opportunity for the purist seeking peak atmospheric performance.
2022 model. Single owner. Zero accidents. Garage kept. Full service history. Flawless paint and interior. Mechanical inspection complete.

This vehicle is a true showroom masterpiece, meticulously preserved in flawless condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish free of any chips or swirls, complemented by wheels that show no curb rash. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule: the premium leather remains supple and unstretched, all electronics function perfectly, and the original floor mats are spotless. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, having been strictly garage-kept and maintained ahead of every service interval with full documentation provided. From the crisp gear shifts to the silent, powerful engine performance, this car offers a driving experience indistinguishable from new. A rare find for the buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom-grade condition, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory luster. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure unrivaled performance and reliability. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of peerless quality and distinction.
